text.title: Text-to-Speech — Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure: scope use case → bench providers → pick + voice + consent → cache + fallback → ship.

step.name: scope-use-case
step.action: Pin latency bucket (real-time / near-real / batch), quality bar, voice cloning need, languages, monthly char volume.
step.decision-gate: If real-time AND no GPU AND budget excludes Deepgram/ElevenLabs — re-scope; cannot meet constraints.

step.name: bench-providers
step.action: Measure TTFB, total synthesis time, MOS (subjective quality), cost-per-char for each candidate.
step.decision-gate: If MOS below acceptance bar across all providers — fix text quality first (SSML, punctuation, voice match).

step.name: pick-provider-voice-consent
step.action: Apply decision tree. Pick voice ID. If cloned voice, attach consent record.
step.decision-gate: If clone voice without consent — STOP; legal block (r2-voice-cloning-consent).

step.name: cache-and-fallback
step.action: Implement SHA256-key cache. Wire fallback on 5xx / timeout. Test fallback path.
step.decision-gate: If fallback also same provider — fix (r5-fallback-mandatory).

step.name: ship
step.action: Roll out 10% → 50% → 100%. Monitor cache_hit_rate, fallback_engaged, TTFB p95.
step.decision-gate: If cache_hit_rate <30% — investigate text variation; consider normalisation before hashing.
